summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of SpyCam Scanner application. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly. Network scanning simulation, device detection, risk scoring, and UI interactions all functioning as specified.
passed_tests: GET /api/ health check endpoint
POST /api/scans/start network scan with device generation
GET /api/scans scan history retrieval
GET /api/scans/{scan_id} specific scan details
DELETE /api/scans/{scan_id} scan deletion
GET /api/scans/{scan_id}/export scan data export
GET /api/stats aggregated statistics
Dashboard page load with metrics cards
Start scan button functionality and results display
Device table with IP, MAC, vendor, ports, risk scores
Device row click opens details side sheet
Filter dropdown (All, Cameras Only, High Risk, Safe Only)
Export button functionality
History page with scan list and CRUD operations
Delete confirmation dialog
Sidebar navigation between Scanner and History
Risk scoring system (RTSP +40, web ports +20, camera vendor +20, camera ports +20)
Camera detection logic for Hikvision, Dahua devices
Proper color coding for risk levels
Responsive UI design and dark theme
